overall.description: A hooded player character stands on a rocky mountain overlook at golden hour, gazing at a distant snow-capped peak and alpine lake. The cinematic game engine footage features dramatic backlighting, atmospheric cloud movement, and birds flying through the valley.

events.description: flock of birds enters frame from left, flying across the sky toward the mountain
character shifts weight and turns head slightly to the left, surveying the landscape

agents.ego_description: hooded figure stands on cliff edge overlooking the valley, cloak billowing gently in the wind, remaining mostly still while occasionally shifting stance

entered.detail: tall mountain peak with snow visible on summit, dramatically backlit by the setting sun
calm body of water nestled in the valley below, reflecting golden light
weathered wooden stake or post on the left edge of the cliff
dense tree cover on the slopes between the viewpoint and the distant lake
cliff edge terrain where the character stands, overlooking the drop

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide mountain vista during golden hour, with a hooded character standing on a rocky outcrop overlooking a distant snow-capped peak and alpine lake. The camera remains in a stable third-person perspective behind the character as birds fly across the dramatic sky, and the character occasionally shifts weight while observing the expansive natural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady, cinematic gaze across a vast mountain vista during the golden hour. It begins from a stable third-person perspective behind a hooded character standing on a rocky outcrop, overlooking a distant snow-capped peak and a serene alpine lake. As the character subtly shifts their weight, the camera maintains its focus on the expansive natural landscape under a dramatic sky. The scene concludes with birds gliding across the horizon, emphasizing the stillness and scale of the environment.
